storyBeat: 年輕的 Robin — 一個會分麵包給窮人的男孩

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事有幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講羅賓漢的故事，先認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在羅賓漢的故事裡：
🔑 forest = 森林
🔑 bow = 弓
🔑 arrow = 箭
🔑 poor = 窮的

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 gold = 金子
🔑 rich = 有錢的
🔑 hide = 藏
🔑 friend = 朋友

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is a bow?
questions.question: Which one is a bow?
questions.explanationZh: bow = 弓 🏹！故事裡羅賓漢用弓射箭，弓是他最厲害的武器。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows a forest?
questions.question: Which one shows a forest?
questions.explanationZh: forest = 森林 🌲！羅賓漢在 Sherwood 森林裡躲藏，那是他的家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Robin Hood hid in the forest to help the poor.
questions.sentenceZh: 羅賓漢躲在森林裡幫助窮人。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: a king sitting on a gold chair in a castle
a boy hiding among tall green trees
an old woman washing clothes by a river
a soldier marching through a busy market
optionsZh: 一個國王坐在城堡金椅上
一個男孩躲在高高的綠樹間
一個老婆婆在河邊洗衣服
一個士兵走過熱鬧的市集
questions.explanationZh: hide = 藏，forest = 森林——句子說羅賓漢藏在森林裡。圖中男孩躲在綠樹間，就是這個意思！

storyBeat: 壞國王收太多錢 — 農夫的米袋空了

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個片語，學會了，羅賓漢的故事就更好懂囉！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在羅賓漢的故事裡：
🔑 green forest = 綠色森林
🔑 shoot an arrow = 射出箭
🔑 help the poor = 幫助窮人
🔑 hide in the trees = 躲在樹裡

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Robin shot an arrow from his bow.
questions.sentenceZh: 羅賓用弓射出一支箭。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'shoot an arrow'?
options: a man riding a horse through a field
a boy throwing a stone into a pond
a young man firing an arrow from a bow
an old man digging in a garden
optionsZh: 一個男孩把石頭丟進池塘
一個年輕人用弓射出箭
一位老人在菜園裡挖地
questions.explanationZh: shoot an arrow = 射箭 🏹！羅賓漢是故事裡最厲害的射手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which emoji shows gold?
questions.question: Which emoji shows gold?
questions.explanationZh: gold = 金子 🏅！壞國王想要更多金子——故事裡 gold 是問題的根源。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every day in the forest, Robin ___ his bow to practise.
questions.sentenceZh: 每天在森林裡，羅賓___他的弓練習射箭。
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
「Every day」= 羅賓天天都做的事——說一個人天天做的事，動詞後面要加 -s → uses 喔。
完整句：Every day in the forest, Robin uses his bow to practise.

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Let's review all the new words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
把這節的重點字再複習一遍：
🔑 green = 綠的
🔑 deer = 鹿
🔑 rich = 富有的
🔑 friend = 朋友

storyBeat: 壞 Sheriff — 警察頭子也欺負好人

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 sheriff = 警察頭子
🔑 mean = 凶的
🔑 hurt = 傷害
🔑 afraid = 害怕的
可怕的壞人出場了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The bad king had a Sheriff (police chief) in the town of Nottingham.
questions.explanationZh: 壞國王在 Nottingham 鎮上有一個 Sheriff——這個人，是壞國王的手。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The Sheriff was tall, with a long face and a long sword on his belt.
questions.explanationZh: Sheriff 高高的，臉很長，腰上掛著一把長劍——光是樣子就讓人不舒服。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: If someone could not pay, the Sheriff threw them in a cold stone room.
questions.questionEn: Did the Sheriff help poor people?
questions.explanationZh: 付不起錢就抓去關冷石房——他不幫窮人，答 No。他只幫自己和國王。
questions.sentenceZh: 如果有人繳不出來，郡長就把他們關進冰冷的石牢。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He hit a boy who tried to keep one loaf of bread for his sister.
questions.explanationZh: 有個男孩想留一條麵包給妹妹，Sheriff 打了他——連小孩都不放過。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: When the Sheriff rode by, even the dogs ran into dark corners.
questions.question: What did the town look like when the Sheriff came?
options: animals hid from fear of him
questions.explanationZh: 他一騎過來，連狗都躲進角落——「連狗都怕他」就是答案。這已經說明一切了。
questions.sentenceZh: 每當郡長騎馬經過，連狗都跑進黑暗的角落躲起來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: One quiet morning, the Sheriff sat in a wooden chair and read a list of names.
questions.explanationZh: 一個安靜的早上，Sheriff 坐在椅子上讀一張名字清單。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His finger stopped on one short word: Robin.
questions.question: Whose name caught the Sheriff's eye?
questions.explanationZh: 他的手指停在一個短短的名字上：Robin——「年輕的 Robin」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的手指停在一個短短的字上：羅賓。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "This boy helps the poor too much," the Sheriff said to the wall.
questions.explanationZh: 「這個男孩太常幫窮人。」他對著牆說——奶奶說，對著牆說話的人，心裡藏著壞主意。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did the Sheriff feel about Robin's kindness?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: Sheriff 怕 Robin 影響他收錢 → 「生氣又嫉妒」。那個 😠 就是他的臉。
questions.sentenceZh: 郡長對羅賓的善行有什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He rolled the list, stood up, and called for his fastest horse...
questions.explanationZh: 他把名單捲起來，站起身，叫人牽最快的馬……奶奶說，這種「靜悄悄地站起來」，往往是最危險的。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The bad king had a Sheriff (police chief) in the town of Nottingham.
questions.question: Where was the Sheriff?
options: a small camp deep in the forest
Robin's village far to the north
on a boat upon the cold sea
optionsZh: 遠北方 Robin 的村莊
questions.explanationZh: 「in the town of Nottingham」——Sheriff 在 Nottingham 鎮。
questions.sentenceZh: 壞國王在 Nottingham 鎮上有一個 Sheriff。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: If someone could not pay, the Sheriff threw them in a cold stone room.
questions.questionEn: Was the Sheriff fair to people who had no money?
questions.explanationZh: 付不起就關進冷石房——這不公平，「不公平」，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 如果有人繳不出來，郡長就把他們關進冰冷的石牢。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 rode = 騎馬 / name = 名字 / list = 清單 / corner = 角落
今晚 Sheriff 的詞！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: When the Sheriff rode by, even the dogs ran into dark corners.
questions.question: What does it mean when even the dogs hide from the Sheriff?
options: it was a game the dogs liked
he was very frightening to all
dogs were looking for their food
optionsZh: 他對所有人都非常可怕
questions.explanationZh: 連狗都怕他躲進角落——「他對所有人都非常可怕」就是這句話的意思！
questions.sentenceZh: 每當郡長騎馬經過，連狗都跑進黑暗的角落躲起來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His finger stopped on one short word: Robin.
questions.question: What was the Sheriff doing with the list of names?
options: giving it over to the bad king
burning it up in the fire soon
reading the roll and spotting the name Robin
optionsZh: 在清單裡找到 Robin 的名字
questions.explanationZh: 他手指停在 Robin 的名字上——「讀著它，找到了 Robin 的名字」就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: 他的手指停在一個短短的字上：羅賓。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "This boy helps the poor too much," the Sheriff said to the wall.
questions.questionEn: Did the Sheriff like that Robin helped the poor?
questions.explanationZh: Sheriff 說 Robin 幫窮人「太多」——他不高興，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 「這個男孩太常幫窮人。」他對著牆說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He rolled the list, stood up, and called for his fastest horse...
questions.question: What was the Sheriff about to do?
options: 🎵 sing a song to his men
questions.explanationZh: 捲起名單、叫最快的馬——「快馬去找 Robin」就是他要做的事！那個 🏇。
questions.sentenceZh: 他把名單捲起來，站起身，叫人牽最快的馬……

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He hit a boy who tried to keep one loaf of bread for his sister.
questions.questionEn: Was the Sheriff kind to children?
questions.explanationZh: 他打了一個只想留麵包給妹妹的男孩——他對孩子不好，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 有個男孩想留一條麵包給妹妹，Sheriff 打了他。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: One quiet morning, the Sheriff sat in a wooden chair and read a list of names.
questions.question: Why did the Sheriff read the list?
options: enjoying name lists as a fun hobby
he was looking for people who owed money
choosing people for a prize or reward
needing names for a big party soon
optionsZh: 把讀名字清單當有趣愛好
questions.explanationZh: Sheriff 讀名單，手指停在 Robin——他在找欠錢的人或製造麻煩的人！
questions.sentenceZh: 一個安靜的早上，Sheriff 坐在椅子上讀一張名字清單。

storyBeat: 「Robin 必須離開」— 一張紙釘在門上

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 leave = 離開
🔑 paper = 紙
🔑 door = 門
🔑 help = 幫忙
告別的時候到了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The Sheriff and his men rode fast to Robin's small village.
questions.explanationZh: Sheriff 和他的人快馬奔向 Robin 的村莊——蹄聲一響，整個村子都知道壞事來了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: They nailed a yellow paper on Robin's front door for everyone to see.
questions.question: Where did they put the paper?
optionsZh: 釘在 Robin 家的前門
questions.explanationZh: 他們把一張黃紙釘在 Robin 家的前門——「釘在 Robin 家的前門」就是答案。讓所有人都看見。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們把一張黃色的紙釘在羅賓家門口，讓所有人都看見。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The paper said, "Robin must leave. He helps poor people too much."
questions.questionEn: Was Robin in big trouble now?
questions.explanationZh: 紙上寫著：「Robin 必須離開，他幫窮人幫太多了。」——被警察頭子下令，當然是大麻煩，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 紙上寫著：「羅賓必須離開，他幫助窮人太多了。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin read the paper twice. His face did not change.
questions.explanationZh: Robin 把那張紙讀了兩遍，臉色沒有變——他沒有驚慌，只是靜靜地讀。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He looked around at the small houses and the children playing in the dust.
questions.question: What did Robin look at one last time?
options: the wide blue sea far away
questions.explanationZh: 他看了看小房子、看了看在路上玩耍的孩子們——「他的家跟他的鄰居」就是他最後看的東西。
questions.sentenceZh: 他望著那些小房子，望著孩子們在塵土裡玩耍。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: An old woman touched his sleeve. "Where will you go, my child?"
questions.explanationZh: 一個老婆婆輕輕碰他的袖子：「孩子，你要去哪裡？」——那雙手，代表整個村子的心。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin smiled softly. "I will go to the forest. The trees will hide me."
questions.question: Where did Robin plan to go?
options: to a town near the sea
questions.explanationZh: 「我去森林，樹木會藏住我。」——「進到森林深處」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 羅賓輕輕笑了笑。「我去森林，樹木會藏著我。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He packed a small bag, his bow, and a brown coat for cold nights.
questions.explanationZh: 他打包了小袋子、弓，還有一件棕色外套——帶的不多，但都是必要的。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did the village people feel when Robin left?
questions.question: How did the village feel?
questions.explanationZh: Robin 一直幫他們 → 「難過失去他」。那個 😢 就是村人送他走的表情。
questions.sentenceZh: 羅賓離開時，村裡的人是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin turned at the village edge and walked toward the deep green trees...
questions.explanationZh: Robin 在村口轉身，走向綠綠的森林深處……奶奶說，有些人離開，不是因為不愛，是因為愛得更深。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: They nailed a yellow paper on Robin's front door for everyone to see.
questions.question: What was on Robin's front door?
options: wooden sign from the local market
a big red flag from the king
yellow paper nailed for all to see
a long letter from a kind friend
optionsZh: 讓所有人看見的釘上黃紙
questions.explanationZh: 「a yellow paper on Robin's front door for everyone to see」——黃紙釘在前門！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們把一張黃色的紙釘在 Robin 家門口，讓所有人都看見。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin tore up the paper and refused to leave his village.
questions.questionEn: Was Robin in serious trouble because of his kindness?
questions.explanationZh: 因為幫窮人就必須離開——這是很嚴重的麻煩，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 紙上寫著：「羅賓必須離開，他幫助窮人太多了。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 front door = 前門 / pack = 打包 / leave = 離開 / sleeve = 袖子
告別的詞！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin read the paper twice. His face did not change.
questions.question: How did Robin react when he read the order to leave?
options: he cried and fell to the ground
going to fight the Sheriff right away
laughing and tearing the paper up
optionsZh: 馬上去找 Sheriff 打架
questions.explanationZh: 他讀了兩遍，臉色沒有變——「他保持冷靜沒有慌亂」就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 把那張紙讀了兩遍，臉色沒有變。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin smiled softly. "I will go to the forest. The trees will hide me."
questions.question: Why did Robin choose to go to the forest?
options: so the trees would keep him hidden
to find food for himself there
to look for the Sheriff's men
he wanted to live alone forever
questions.explanationZh: 「The trees will hide me」——「這樣樹木能藏住他」就是他選森林的理由！
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 輕輕笑了笑。「我去森林，樹木會藏著我。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He packed a small bag, his bow, and a brown coat for cold nights.
questions.questionEn: Did Robin bring many things with him?
questions.explanationZh: 只帶了小袋子、弓和一件外套——東西不多，答 No！他帶的很少。
questions.sentenceZh: 他打包了小袋子、弓，還有一件棕色外套。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: An old woman touched his sleeve. "Where will you go, my child?"
questions.question: What did the old woman's question show?
questions.explanationZh: 她碰他袖子、問他去哪——「她關心 Robin」就是這個動作的意思！那個 💙。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個老婆婆輕輕碰他的袖子：「孩子，你要去哪裡？」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He looked around at the small houses and the children playing in the dust.
questions.questionEn: Did Robin take one last look at his village before leaving?
questions.explanationZh: 「He looked around at the small houses」——他環顧小房子，這是最後一眼，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 他看了看小房子、看了看在路上玩耍的孩子們。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin turned at the village edge and walked toward the deep green trees...
questions.question: What did Robin do at the edge of the village?
options: he stopped and turned back to stay
sat down there to write a letter
headed into the thick green woods
called out loudly for any help
questions.explanationZh: 「turned at the village edge and walked toward the deep green trees」——走進森林！
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 在村口轉身，走向綠綠的森林深處……

questions.sentence: The trees will hide me.
questions.explanationZh: Robin 對老婆婆說的話！hide = 藏住。他相信森林能保護他。
questions.sentenceZh: 樹木會藏住我。

questions.sentence: He helps the poor too much.
questions.answer: He helps the poor too much.
accept: He helped the poor too much.
He helps poor people too much.
He helped poor people too much.
questions.explanationZh: 這是黃紙上寫的話！the poor = 窮人（當名詞用）。Sheriff 覺得 Robin 做太多好事了。
questions.sentenceZh: 他幫助窮人太多了。

questions.sentence: Robin read the paper twice.
accept: Robin read the paper two times.
Robin read that paper two times.
questions.explanationZh: twice = 兩遍，比說『two times』更自然！Robin 很冷靜，讀了兩遍臉色都沒有變。
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 把那張紙讀了兩遍。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He packed a small bag, his bow, and a brown coat for cold nights.
questions.question: What does Robin's choice of items tell us about him?
options: he forgot most of his things at home
he was ready to travel light and act fast
he wanted to show off his new coat
he was planning to go shopping soon
optionsZh: 他把大部分東西忘在家裡了
他準備好輕裝上路、快速行動
questions.explanationZh: 只帶弓、小袋子和外套——東西少表示他重視行動靈活，不是想要舒適。『輕裝快速行動』才符合他離開村莊的處境。注意：正確答案沒有重複句子裡的 bag、bow、coat 等字。

storyBeat: 走進 Sherwood — 高高的樹和安靜的風

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 forest = 森林
🔑 tree = 樹
🔑 tall = 高的
🔑 walk = 走
走進 Sherwood 了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin walked alone into the great forest of Sherwood.
questions.explanationZh: Robin 一個人走進廣大的 Sherwood 森林——那是一片傳說中的森林，很大，也很深。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The trees were tall, much taller than any church in the town.
questions.question: How tall were the trees?
options: about the size of small bushes
optionsZh: 差不多像矮樹叢那麼大
questions.explanationZh: 樹比鎮上任何建築都高，比教堂還高——「比鎮上任何建築都高」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 樹木高聳，比鎮上任何一座教堂都還要高。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Only thin light came down through the leaves to the soft brown ground.
questions.questionEn: Was the forest dark inside?
questions.explanationZh: 只有細細的光透下來——「只有細細的光」，森林裡很暗，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 只有細細的光線穿過葉縫，灑在柔軟的棕色地面上。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The wind moved slowly. Birds called softly above his head.
questions.explanationZh: 風很慢，鳥在頭頂輕輕叫——這片森林，有一種安靜的生命力。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin took a slow breath. The forest air smelled sweet, like clean rain.
questions.question: What did the forest smell like?
questions.explanationZh: 森林的空氣聞起來甜甜的，像剛下過雨——「甜甜又乾淨」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 羅賓慢慢深吸一口氣，森林的空氣聞起來清甜，像洗過的雨。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He found a small path made by deer feet, and he followed it.
questions.explanationZh: 他找到一條鹿走出來的小徑，跟著走——動物找的路，通常是最好的路。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: By a clear stream, he sat down and drank from his two hands.
questions.question: What did Robin do at the stream?
options: took a long drink of water
questions.explanationZh: 在清澈的小溪邊，他用兩隻手捧水喝——「好好喝了一口水」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 在一條清澈的小溪旁，他坐下來，用雙手捧著水喝。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: For the first time in many days, no soldier could see his face.
questions.explanationZh: 好多天以來，第一次，沒有士兵看得見他——奶奶說，這種安全感，叫做「喘了一口氣」。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Robin feel inside Sherwood Forest?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 森林藏住他 → 「安靜又比較安全」。那個 😌 就是他走進樹林後的感受。
questions.sentenceZh: 在雪伍德森林裡，羅賓心裡是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then, from behind a wide oak tree, he heard a quiet cough...
questions.explanationZh: 從一棵大橡樹後面，傳來一聲輕輕的咳嗽……奶奶說，森林裡的咳嗽聲，總是比外面更清楚。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin walked alone into the great forest of Sherwood.
questions.question: Where did Robin go after leaving his village?
options: a town by the wide blue sea
questions.explanationZh: 「into the great forest of Sherwood」——走進 Sherwood 大森林！
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 一個人走進廣大的 Sherwood 森林。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The trees were tall, much taller than any church in the town.
questions.questionEn: Were the Sherwood trees very tall?
questions.explanationZh: 比鎮上任何教堂都高——是非常高的樹，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 樹木高聳，比鎮上任何一座教堂都還要高。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 stream = 小溪 / deer = 鹿 / path = 小徑 / oak = 橡樹
森林裡的自然詞！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin took a slow breath. The forest air smelled sweet, like clean rain.
questions.question: What did Robin notice about the forest air?
options: sweet and clean like fresh rain
it smelled like old fire and smoke
it had no smell at all inside
it smelled of salt from the sea
optionsZh: 甜甜又乾淨像雨後清新
questions.explanationZh: 「smelled sweet, like clean rain」——甜甜的，像清新的雨，就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 慢慢深吸一口氣，森林的空氣聞起來清甜，像洗過的雨。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: For the first time in many days, no soldier could see his face.
questions.question: Why was this moment important for Robin?
options: he finally found a really good meal
hidden from enemy eyes for the first time in days
he met a dear long-lost old friend
he found a warm and cosy new house
optionsZh: 暫時從士兵那裡安全了
questions.explanationZh: 「no soldier could see his face」——士兵看不見他，「他暫時從士兵那裡安全了」！
questions.sentenceZh: 好多天以來，第一次，沒有士兵看得見他。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Only thin light came down through the leaves to the soft brown ground.
questions.questionEn: Was Sherwood Forest bright and sunny inside?
questions.explanationZh: 「only thin light」——只有細細的光，裡面很暗，不是明亮，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 只有細細的光線穿過葉縫，灑在柔軟的棕色地面上。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Then, from behind a wide oak tree, he heard a quiet cough...
questions.question: What was about to happen next?
questions.explanationZh: 橡樹後面傳來咳嗽聲——「Robin 要遇到某個人」，那個 👥！
questions.sentenceZh: 從一棵大橡樹後面，傳來一聲輕輕的咳嗽……

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin walked in circles and could not find any path in the forest.
questions.questionEn: Did Robin use a deer path to walk in the forest?
questions.explanationZh: 「found a small path made by deer feet, and he followed it」——他找到鹿踩出的小徑跟著走，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 他找到一條鹿走出來的小徑，跟著走。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: By a clear stream, he sat down and drank from his two hands.
questions.question: What did Robin do at the clear stream?
options: called to the deer for help
hid his bow in the water
questions.explanationZh: 「sat down and drank from his two hands」——坐下來用手捧水喝，就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: 在一條清澈的小溪旁，他坐下來，用雙手捧著水喝。

storyBeat: 森林裡的人 — 也被壞人趕來這裡

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 hide = 藏
🔑 sad = 難過的
🔑 home = 家
🔑 lose = 失去
失去家的人也在這裡。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin stood up slowly. He did not pull his bow.
questions.explanationZh: Robin 慢慢站起來，沒有拉弓——他不想嚇人，他先聽。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Behind the oak tree was a thin man with a torn brown coat.
questions.question: Who was hiding behind the tree?
options: a thin man in torn clothes
a fat lord in rich clothes
optionsZh: 一個穿破衣服的瘦男人
questions.explanationZh: 橡樹後面，一個穿著破褐色外套的瘦男人——「穿破衣服的瘦男人」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 大橡樹後面，走出一個穿著破爛棕色外套的瘦男人。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Two more people came out from behind the bushes, then three, then six.
questions.questionEn: Was Robin really alone in the forest?
questions.explanationZh: 從樹叢後面又出來兩個人、三個人、六個人——「不是只有他」，答 No。原來森林裡藏著很多人。
questions.sentenceZh: 又從灌木叢後冒出兩個人，然後三個，然後六個。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: They were old farmers, young mothers, and two small boys.
questions.explanationZh: 老農夫、年輕的媽媽、兩個小男孩——這些人，每一個都有故事。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "The Sheriff took our farm," one old man said. His voice broke.
questions.question: Why did the people come to the forest?
options: they came on a fun camping trip
they lost their homes to the Sheriff
they wanted to hunt deer for fun
they came to see the king ride by
optionsZh: 他們的家被 Sheriff 拿走
他們來看國王騎馬經過
questions.explanationZh: 「Sheriff 拿走我們的農場。」老農夫的聲音都啞了——「他們的家被 Sheriff 拿走」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 「郡長把我們的農場沒收了，」一個老人說，聲音哽咽了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "We had nowhere else to go, so we came here," a young mother added.
questions.explanationZh: 「我們沒有別的地方去，所以來了這裡。」一個年輕媽媽說——森林是他們最後的地方。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: They lived under low branches and slept on soft beds of dry leaves.
questions.question: How did the forest people live?
optionsZh: 用很簡單、很辛苦的方式
questions.explanationZh: 住在樹枝下、睡在乾葉子上——「很簡單、很辛苦的方式」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們住在低矮的樹枝下，睡在鋪著乾樹葉的軟床上。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin sat down with them on a fallen log. His hand was warm on the old man's arm.
questions.explanationZh: Robin 坐下來，把手放在老人的手臂上——那雙溫暖的手，比很多話都有力量。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Robin feel for the forest people?
questions.question: How did he feel?
optionsZh: 替他們難過,對他們溫柔
questions.explanationZh: 看到他們失去家 → Robin「替他們難過，對他們溫柔」。那個 💗 就是他的心。
questions.sentenceZh: 羅賓對森林裡的這些人有什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin looked at every tired face and slowly stood up tall...
questions.explanationZh: Robin 看著每一張累累的臉，慢慢站起來……奶奶說，「慢慢站起來」的人，往往是真的想清楚了才起來的。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Behind the oak tree was a thin man with a torn brown coat.
questions.question: Who was hiding behind the oak tree?
options: a thin man in worn-out clothes
a young child from the village
optionsZh: 一個穿破舊衣服的瘦男人
questions.explanationZh: 「a thin man with a torn brown coat」——穿著破棕色外套的瘦男人！
questions.sentenceZh: 橡樹後面，走出一個穿著破爛棕色外套的瘦男人。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Two more people came out from behind the bushes, then three, then six.
questions.questionEn: Were there many people hiding in the forest?
questions.explanationZh: 兩個、三個、六個——「是，有很多人藏在森林裡」，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 又從灌木叢後冒出兩個人，然後三個，然後六個。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 bushes = 樹叢 / farm = 農場 / voice broke = 聲音啞了 / fallen log = 倒下的木頭
森林裡的詞！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "The Sheriff took our farm," one old man said. His voice broke.
questions.question: What happened to the old man's voice, and what does that tell us?
options: his voice was loud and angry
his voice was happy and calm
his voice was weak from a bad cold
optionsZh: 聲音哽咽，顯示他很傷心
他的聲音因感冒而虛弱
questions.explanationZh: 「His voice broke」——聲音哽咽，「哽咽，顯示他很傷心」就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: 「郡長把我們的農場沒收了，」一個老人說，聲音哽咽了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: They lived under low branches and slept on soft beds of dry leaves.
questions.question: How did the forest people make do without proper homes?
options: building strong wooden houses for shelter
buying canvas tents at a market
using branches and dry leaves instead
sleeping in the cold stream water
optionsZh: 建造堅固的木屋遮風避雨
改用樹枝和乾樹葉代替
questions.explanationZh: 住在樹枝下、睡在乾葉子床上——「用樹枝和乾樹葉」就是他們的方式！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們住在低矮的樹枝下，睡在鋪著乾樹葉的軟床上。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin stood apart and did not speak to any of the forest people.
questions.questionEn: Did Robin show kindness to the forest people?
questions.explanationZh: 他坐下來、把手放在老人手臂上——這就是關心和溫柔，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 坐下來，把手放在老人的手臂上——那雙溫暖的手。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin stood up slowly. He did not pull his bow.
questions.question: What did Robin's actions show when he met the stranger?
options: 🏃 he was ready to run away
questions.explanationZh: 慢慢站起來、沒有拉弓——「他是開放且和平的」就是這個動作的意思！那個 🤝。
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 慢慢站起來，沒有拉弓。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin looked at every tired face and slowly stood up tall...
questions.questionEn: Did Robin decide to do something for the forest people?
questions.explanationZh: 他看著疲倦的臉、慢慢站起來——「慢慢站起來」表示他心裡已有決定，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 看著每一張累累的臉，慢慢站起來……

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "We had nowhere else to go, so we came here," a young mother added.
questions.question: Why did the young mother's family come to the forest?
options: the deep woods offered the only refuge they had
they simply loved camping in the trees
they were chasing a deer for food
they were meeting Robin on purpose
optionsZh: 森林是他們唯一安全的地方
他們在追一頭鹿找食物
questions.explanationZh: 「nowhere else to go」——沒有別的地方去，「森林是他們唯一安全的地方」！
questions.sentenceZh: 「我們沒有別的地方去，所以來了這裡。」一個年輕媽媽說。

storyBeat: 「我們會互相幫忙」— 一個新團體誕生

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 together = 一起
🔑 take = 拿
🔑 rich = 有錢的
🔑 give = 給
一個新的開始！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin spoke in a clear, quiet voice. The forest people leaned in.
questions.explanationZh: Robin 說話，清楚又安靜，所有人都靠過來——這樣的聲音，讓人想往前聽。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "We will help each other," he said. "No one is alone here anymore."
questions.question: What did Robin promise the people?
options: each must take care of himself
they would all go home soon
questions.explanationZh: 「我們會互相幫忙，這裡沒有人是孤單的。」——「他們會互相幫忙」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我們要互相幫忙，」他說，「從今以後，沒有人是孤單的。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Some of the people stood straighter, and a few even smiled.
questions.questionEn: Did Robin's words give the people hope?
questions.explanationZh: 有些人站直了，有幾個人甚至笑了——「重新有希望」，答 Yes。那個笑，不容易。
questions.sentenceZh: 一些人站得更挺了，幾個人甚至露出了笑容。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "The rich bad men took from you. So we will take from them," Robin said.
questions.explanationZh: 「有錢的壞人拿走你們的，所以我們也從他們那裡拿。」——Robin 說出了大家心裡的話。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "And every coin we take, we will give back to poor families."
questions.question: What was Robin's new plan?
options: keep all the gold safe for himself
buy a new castle with high walls
take from rich bad men, give to the poor
fight everyone he meets on the road
optionsZh: 把所有金子都留給自己
買一座有高牆的新城堡
從有錢壞人那裡拿,給窮人
跟路上遇到的每個人打架
questions.explanationZh: 「每一個拿到的銅板，都給窮苦的家庭。」——「從有錢壞人那裡拿，給窮人」就是答案。這就是 Robin Hood 的精神。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我們拿到的每一枚錢，都要還給窮困的家庭。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: An old farmer wiped his eyes. "I will follow you," he said.
questions.explanationZh: 一個老農夫擦了眼睛，說：「我跟你。」——奶奶說，這四個字，是這一節最重要的四個字。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: One by one, every man and woman around the fire said the same thing.
questions.question: How many people joined Robin?
questions.explanationZh: 一個一個，火堆旁所有人都說同樣的話——「在場每一個人」就是答案。沒有人缺席。
questions.sentenceZh: 圍在火堆旁的男男女女，一個接一個說出同樣的話。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: That night, a small fire warmed a new circle of friends in Sherwood.
questions.explanationZh: 那天晚上，一把小火，溫暖了 Sherwood 森林裡一群新朋友——那個圓圈，就是一個新的開始。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Robin and his new friends feel by the fire?
questions.question: How did they feel?
options: 🤝 strong because they had each other
😢 still all alone in the cold forest
😡 just feeling angry about the rich men
😴 just sleepy and ready for bed soon
optionsZh: 在寒冷森林裡仍然孤單
只是對有錢人感到生氣
只是想睡, 準備上床了
questions.explanationZh: 他們從孤單變成有夥伴 → 「因為有彼此而堅強」。那個 🤝 就是他們的感受。
questions.sentenceZh: 圍著火堆，羅賓和他的新朋友們是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Far away, in his cold castle, the Sheriff did not yet know what was coming...
questions.explanationZh: 遠遠的地方，在他冷冷的城堡裡，Sheriff 還不知道什麼正在朝他來……奶奶說，善良的人一旦聚在一起，就沒有人能輕易打散。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "We will help each other," he said. "No one is alone here anymore."
questions.question: What did Robin promise the forest people?
options: they would fight the king that week
he would go back to his village alone
he would find them new houses
optionsZh: 他們那週要去跟國王打
questions.explanationZh: 「We will help each other」——「他們會互相幫忙」就是 Robin 的承諾！
questions.sentenceZh: 「我們要互相幫忙，」他說，「從今以後，沒有人是孤單的。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Some of the people stood straighter, and a few even smiled.
questions.questionEn: Did Robin's words make the people feel better?
questions.explanationZh: 站得更直了、有幾個甚至笑了——他的話讓人感覺更好了，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 一些人站得更挺了，幾個人甚至露出了笑容。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 circle = 圓圈 / fire = 火堆 / follow = 跟 / friend = 夥伴
新夥伴的詞！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "The rich bad men took from you. So we will take from them," Robin said.
questions.question: What was Robin's idea for justice?
options: ask the king nicely for help
build a new village far away
steal from bad men, share with the needy
leave England for a better land
optionsZh: 從有錢人那裡拿，給窮人
離開英格蘭去更好的地方
questions.explanationZh: 「take from them」——「從貪心的有錢人那裡拿，幫助窮人」就是 Robin 的正義！
questions.sentenceZh: 「有錢的壞人拿走你們的。所以我們也從他們那裡拿。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: One by one, every man and woman around the fire said the same thing.
questions.question: How many people agreed to join Robin?
options: none at all in the end
questions.explanationZh: 「every man and woman... said the same thing」——「在場每一個人」都答應了！
questions.sentenceZh: 圍在火堆旁的男男女女，一個接一個說出同樣的話。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: That night the forest was cold and dark and everyone went to sleep alone.
questions.questionEn: Did a new group of friends form in the forest that night?
questions.explanationZh: 「a new circle of friends in Sherwood」——那晚，一個新的朋友圈誕生了，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 那天晚上，一把小火，溫暖了 Sherwood 森林裡一群新朋友。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "We ___ help each other," Robin said. "No one is alone here anymore."
questions.sentenceZh: 「我們___互相幫忙，」Robin 說，「從今以後，沒有人是孤單的。」
questions.question: Choose the correct verb form.
questions.explanationZh: 「will + 動詞原形」是表示未來的說法——「will help」！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Far away, in his cold castle, the Sheriff did not yet know what was coming...
questions.questionEn: Did the Sheriff know what Robin and his friends were planning?
questions.explanationZh: 「did not yet know」——他還不知道，答 No！壞事要降臨在 Sheriff 身上了。
questions.sentenceZh: 遠遠的地方，在他冷冷的城堡裡，Sheriff 還不知道什麼正在朝他來……

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Robin spoke in a clear, quiet voice. The forest people leaned in.
questions.question: What does it mean when the forest people leaned in to listen?
options: wanting Robin to speak much louder
just looking at the fire pit
optionsZh: 想要 Robin 說大聲一點
questions.explanationZh: 靠過來聽——「他們好奇且專心聽」就是「leaned in」的意思！
questions.sentenceZh: Robin 說話，清楚又安靜，所有人都靠過來。
